meta.usage: Use patterns[].lineStart/lineEnd to read exact sections with read_file tool

patterns.title: 1. Cross-Chain Replay Attacks
patterns.rootCause: Bridge messages or signatures don't include sufficient context (chain ID, contract address, nonce) to prevent replay across different chains or contract instances.

patterns.title: 2. Signature Validation Issues
patterns.rootCause: No signature length validation

patterns.title: 3. Token Bridging Issues
patterns.rootCause: Doesn't account for transfer fees

patterns.title: 4. Sequencer & L2 Specific Issues
patterns.rootCause: Blocked when sequencer down

patterns.title: 5. Access Control Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause: Approval persists after bridging

patterns.title: 6. Slippage & MEV Issues
patterns.rootCause: No minimum output

patterns.title: 7. Message Ordering & Timing
patterns.rootCause: Assumes message order

patterns.title: 1. ISM Validation Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause: Contracts that receive Hyperlane messages fail to configure or validate the ISM properly, allowing arbitrary message acceptance without proper signature/proof verification.

patterns.title: 2. Message Replay Attacks
patterns.rootCause: When message processing fails (reverts), the protocol may not mark the message as consumed. Subsequent retries process the message again, causing double-spend or unlimited minting.

patterns.title: 3. Router Configuration Issues
patterns.rootCause: Any sender accepted

patterns.title: 4. Handle Function Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause: State change after external call

patterns.title: 5. Gas Payment Issues
patterns.rootCause: Hardcoded gas may be insufficient

frontmatter.bridge_attack_vector: channel_blocking | minimum_gas | gas_estimation | fee_refund | payload_size | composed_message | peer_config | decimal_mismatch | amount_trimming

subsections.title: Cross-Chain Issuance Cap & Limit Bypass Vulnerabilities

patterns.title: 1. Channel Blocking Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause: Protocols inherit from `LzApp` without implementing the non-blocking pattern (`NonblockingLzApp`), or they implement it incorrectly. When `lzReceive()` reverts, the message is stored in `storedPayload

patterns.title: 2. Minimum Gas Validation Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause: Protocols allow users to specify arbitrary `adapterParams` without validating the gas limit meets minimum requirements for the destination chain operation.

patterns.title: 3. Gas Estimation & Fee Calculation
patterns.rootCause: Uses source chain gas config for destination

patterns.title: 4. Fee Refund Handling
patterns.rootCause: Contract cannot receive refunds

patterns.title: 5. Payload Size & Address Validation
patterns.rootCause: No limit on _toAddress length

patterns.title: 6. Composed Message Vulnerabilities (LayerZero V2)
patterns.rootCause: Composed messages introduce dual-transaction patterns where the initial receive and subsequent compose execution are separate transactions. Failures in either stage can leave tokens stranded or preven

patterns.title: 7. OFT/ONFT Specific Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause: Doesn't account for different decimals on chains

patterns.title: 8. Peer & Trust Configuration Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause: Uses sender address if peer not configured

patterns.title: 9. Stargate/sgReceive Integration Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause: Complex operations can run out of gas

patterns.title: 10. Cross-Chain Payload Validation Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause: tapSendData.tapOftAddress not validated

patterns.title: 11. Insufficient Gas Limit Calculation
patterns.rootCause: 20k gas per token is insufficient for minting

patterns.title: 1. VAA Parsing Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause: Protocols either use outdated/deprecated Wormhole methods for VAA parsing, fail to validate all VAA fields properly, or don't verify the guardian signatures correctly.

patterns.title: 2. Guardian Set Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause: Protocols don't account for guardian set transitions properly. During transitions, both old and new guardian set signatures are valid, potentially allowing replay of old guardian actions.

patterns.title: 3. Message Replay Attacks
patterns.rootCause: Same VAA can be replayed across instances

patterns.title: 4. Token Bridge Integration
patterns.rootCause: Uses transferWithPayload incorrectly

patterns.title: 5. Gas Limit Issues
patterns.rootCause: Gas limit cannot be updated
